narrative:
Cols 84-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,477 registered voters, with 43.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 38.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 19.8 percentage points.
